name: skin-neumorphic
title: Neumorphic skin
description: Soft-UI concept skin: monochrome surface, depth from paired light/dark shadows, borderless. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="neumorphic"].
docs: 1) @import "./skins/neumorphic.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="neumorphic" on <html>.
